title: Videographer posts client’s wedding video on social media without consent
summary: An individual complained that a videographer she hired to record an event was sharing her personal information without her consent by using the video he produced for her wedding to promote his business online. We determined that the complainant’s personal information was being used for a commercial purpose and under PIPEDA , an individual...
dedupKey: videographer posts client s wedding video on social media without consent|2014-05-22
